cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Navjot ji, kaise ho aap? Main Jana Small Finance Bank se bol raha hoon.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Main thik hu, sir. Aap kaun hain?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Navjot ji, aapka account dormant ho gaya hai. Aapko pata hai ki aapko kya karna hoga usse reactivate karne ke liye?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Nahin sir, mujhe pata nahin. Kya main isse phone se kar sakti hoon?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Nahin Navjot ji, aapko branch mein jana hoga aur official ID proof lekar jana hoga. Hum isse phone se nahi kar sakte.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 48s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: Dormant Account Reactivation: Agent calls to inform a user that their account has become dormant and explains the official, in-branch procedure to reactivate it.
